title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason discusses the /goal feature for autonomous coding workflows, comparing it to Ralph-loop 2.0. The video covers goal-setting practices, mission exploration for long horizontal tasks, and demonstrates tools like Crewlet and Superdesign for building AI agents.
